name: Cal Kestis - Fun In The Snow
description:
Going to Ilum, but you've never seen snow!

Hello! I couldn't help myself, I had to jump in on the event, in fact this is the first time doing a event bot! Hopefully you like it!

"Proxy please?" Unfortunately no, I don't understand enough about proxies to do that, sorry guys.

Disclaimer picture is not mine I found it on Google
creator: Roxi Lexion
